message:
refactor: apply idiomatic Rust patterns and clippy lint fixes across codebase

Systematic cleanup addressing modern Rust idioms and clippy suggestions:

if-let chains (RFC 2497):
- src/ballast/release.rs: collapse nested if-let + if into single chain
- src/cli/dashboard.rs: merge event::poll + Event::Key match, merge
  mount rate check, merge config parse chain
- src/cli/update.rs: collapse nested fs::read_to_string + serde parse,
  collapse current_exe + parent check
- src/core/config.rs: merge SBH_UPDATE_OPT_OUT lookup + parse
- src/daemon/self_monitor.rs: merge write interval check, merge RSS
  parsing (VmRSS), merge thread stall check
- src/daemon/service.rs: merge current_exe + exists check

let-else patterns:
- src/daemon/loop_main.rs: convert match-continue to let-else for
  special location fs_collector.collect
- src/logger/jsonl.rs: flatten match on fallback open to if-let/else

derive(Default) vs manual impl:
- src/core/config.rs: replace manual Default impl with #[derive(Default)]
  since all fields already implement Default

Clippy lint fixes:
- src/cli/assets.rs: add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)]
- src/cli/dashboard.rs: use f64::midpoint, map_or_else, checked_sub,
  remove redundant ref in if-let, deduplicate row += 1
- src/cli/update.rs: use map_or_else for default_backup_dir,
  pass errors directly to step_fail (Display impl), add
  struct_excessive_bools and too_many_lines allows,
  use serde_json::Value::as_u64 method reference
- src/cli_app.rs: add #[allow(dead_code)] for currently unused label fns
- src/core/config.rs: derive Eq where PartialEq was already derived
  (ScannerConfig, BallastConfig, BallastVolumeOverride, UpdateConfig,
  PathsConfig), use is_none_or instead of map_or for is_volume_enabled,
  add collection_is_never_read and too_many_lines allows
- src/daemon/loop_main.rs: pass scanner/executor thread args by reference,
  change handle_pressure return from Result<()> to (), change shutdown
  return from Result<()> to (), use JoinHandle::is_finished method
  reference, add too_many_lines allow, add cast allows
- src/daemon/policy.rs: remove unused StructuralSignals import, remove
  unnecessary mut on candidate
- src/daemon/self_monitor.rs: use checked_sub instead of arithmetic
  sub on Instant, use Error::other instead of Error::new, add
  cast_possible_truncation allows, restructure cache_hit to avoid
  holding read lock across return
- src/daemon/service.rs: add unused_self allows for launchctl methods
- src/logger/jsonl.rs: remove & from rotated_name call
- src/monitor/ewma.rs: use mul_add for fused multiply-add operations
  (burstiness alpha, confidence, EWMA, discriminant)
- src/monitor/fs_stats.rs: inline cache write, restructure cache_hit
  to scope read lock properly
- src/monitor/guardrails.rs: use is_multiple_of and f64::midpoint
- src/monitor/pid.rs: use mul_add for PID output, add cast allow
- src/platform/pal.rs: derive Eq on FsStats, remove unnecessary return
  in detect_platform

Test fixes:
- tests/common/mod.rs: add #![allow(dead_code)] for shared module
- tests/integration_tests.rs: remove unused GuardrailConfig import,
  add dead_code allow, prefix unused variables with underscore
- tests/stress_tests.rs: remove unused FallbackReason import

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 /// Run the fetch pipeline for all manifest assets.
 #[must_use]
+#[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)]
 pub fn fetch_assets(
     manifest: &AssetManifest,
     cache: &AssetCache,
